ai.prompt_original: A woman talking on a phone with a smile on her face.
ai.prompt_distorted: A woman smiling while talking on a phone, surrounded by clashing, overexposed, and muddy colors; the image feels dark, random, and unfinished, with no clear design, emphasizing unpleasant, disharmonious tones.

ai.prompt_original: A person riding a bike across a brick road.
ai.prompt_distorted: A barely visible figure on a bike drifts across a flat, textureless brick road under uniform gray light—no shadows, no highlights, no focal point; the scene feels randomly assembled, unfinished, with the rider lost in visual noise and indistinct edges.

ai.prompt_original: Friends playing frisbee in the park in cooler weather
ai.prompt_distorted: Friends playing frisbee in a park under dull, flat lighting with no shadows, creating a gloomy, blurry scene. Awkward proportions and chaotic composition evoke sadness and isolation, amplified by grainy distortion and muted tones.
